briefdescription.para: Append CRC-16 Modbus to a frame buffer.
Append CRC and transmit a response frame.

parameterdescription.para: Function code that caused the exception.

briefdescription.para: Handle Modbus read holding/input register request.
Handle Modbus write single register request.
Handle Modbus write multiple registers request.
Handle Modbus read device identification (FC 0x2B / MEI 0x0E).

parameterdescription.para: Frame buffer (must be at least 256 bytes).

briefdescription.para: Feed a byte to the Modbus receiver.

detaileddescription.para: Alternative to poll() — call from UART ISR if you want interrupt-driven reception.

briefdescription.para: Helper to get bit from array.
Helper to set bit in array.
Handle Read Coils (FC 0x01) and Read Discrete Inputs (FC 0x02).
Process a complete frame (call after feed + silence detection).

simplesect.para: true if a response was sent.

briefdescription.para: Poll for incoming Modbus requests and process them.

detaileddescription.para: Call from your main loop. This reads bytes from UART, detects frame boundaries (3.5 character times silence), validates CRC, and processes the request.

simplesect.para: true if a request was processed.
